description:
About the job

We're a fast-growing performance marketing agency that manages tens of millions per month in direct-response ad spending for awesome direct-to-consumer brands.




We work with disruptive brands, big budgets, and make crazy ideas come to life!

Our model is built upon the core values of Alignment and Transparency, which means that, unlike traditional agencies that win by charging huge retainers, Pilothouse wins by delivering huge results.




Alongside our team of 180+ members spanning Media Buyers, Copywriters, Content Managers, Landing Page Developers, Content Creators, Email & SMS Coordinators, CGC & Influencer Managers, we need an Email and Retention Marketer Automation Specialist to own client relationships, develop email & customer retention strategies, and drive ongoing engagement and conversions, all while working alongside an amazing team.




REQUIREMENTS:

2–4 years of experience in email marketing or digital marketing.
Proven ability to manage client relationships and develop tailored email/retention strategies.
Experience building and optimizing automated email flows (welcome series, abandon cart, post-purchase, win-back, etc.).
Strong analytical skills with experience in segmentation, campaign strategy, and performance analysis.
Hands-on experience with platforms like Klaviyo, Mailchimp, and automation tools.
Ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams (copywriters, designers, technicians).
Track record of creating engaging content that aligns with brand voice and resonates with audiences.




ESSENTIAL QUALITIES:

Strategic Thinker – Can design and execute lifecycle campaigns that balance client goals with performance metrics.
Creative & Trend-Savvy – Brings fresh ideas, identifies emerging trends, and translates them into engaging campaigns.
Analytical & Data-Driven – Comfortable digging into performance metrics to generate actionable insights.
Collaborative – Skilled at acting as the hub of a multidisciplinary team and aligning everyone toward results.
Problem Solver – Able to troubleshoot issues with flows, deliverability, or campaign execution with ease.
Clear Communicator – Strong written/verbal skills for presenting strategies, insights, and results.




THE DAY-TO-DAY:

Client Management – Build and maintain strong relationships, understanding client goals and tailoring retention strategies.
Campaign Execution – Oversee end-to-end campaign creation: briefing creative, testing, scheduling, and launching campaigns.
Performance Analysis & Optimization – Monitor key KPIs (open rates, CTR, conversions) and continuously A/B test and iterate.
Segmentation & Strategy – Use customer data to create segmented, targeted campaigns for maximum engagement.
Creative Direction – Guide email copy/design to ensure high-quality output that is both on-brand and performance-driven.
Flow & Automation Management – Design, build, and continuously optimize automated lifecycle flows across the full customer journey, balancing revenue-driving automations with engagement-focused content to keep lists active.
Collaboration – Work closely with copywriters, designers, and technicians to bring campaigns to life on time and at a high standard.




ABOUT THE POSITION

This role sits on our Email & Retention team, where we focus on keeping customers engaged long after acquisition. A core part of this role involves building and refining automated email flows that drive consistent revenue while keeping engagement lists healthy. You'll act as the strategic lead for your accounts, bringing together cross-functional talent to build retention engines that drive client growth.




ABOUT PILOTHOUSE

We are focused on building a team of hustlers who are passionate about the Direct-To-Consumer space and eager to learn and grow. We push each other to do awesome work and encourage team members to bring even the wildest ideas forward.

Team culture is everything at Pilothouse. We have regular check-ins to discuss industry trends and new opportunities. You'll work with a team that has decades of marketing experience, who want to learn from you just as much as you will from them.




APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS

Along with your resume, please submit:

A cover letter
A brief explanation of why you’re excited about this position
(Optional but awesome) An example of past email/retention campaigns you’ve worked on that you’re proud of.

We appreciate your time and thank all applicants for their interest, but we will only be responding to shortlisted applicants.




BENEFITS

Perks for our online team members

Fun virtual events — we host company events to focus on fun and growth
Casual dress
Work from home
Flexible work schedule

description:
About the job

Company Introduction

WorldStrides is the global leader in educational travel and experiential learning. The company was founded in 1967 to provide middle school travel programs to Washington, D.C. and has grown to provide a wide range of programs for more than half a million students annually to over 100 countries around the world. WorldStrides offers experiential learning programs in educational travel, performing arts, language immersion, career exploration, service-learning, study abroad, and sports. Each of these experiences helps students to see beyond the classroom and to see the world – and themselves – in new ways.

Job Description

The Lead Generation Representative / Lead Qualifier is responsible for generating new business opportunities through high-volume outbound calls and email outreach to schools and teachers across the U.S.

In this role, you will: Proactively prospect and engage educators to introduce WorldStrides programs, qualify leads by identifying teachers interested in organizing student travel experiences, consistently meet and exceed monthly targets for calls and qualified leads, and collaborate with the Sales team by passing high-quality opportunities for closing.

This is a goal-driven, outbound sales role where success depends on your ability to handle rejection and stay motivated, build rapport quickly over the phone, maintain strong activity levels daily, and meet weekly and monthly goals in order to achieve additional compensation through a set commission structure.

You’ll work with a wide range of educational travel programs (history, science, national parks, and more), giving you constant opportunities to connect with new prospects and refine your sales and communication skills.

Responsibilities


Make calls and leave messages for teachers nationwide and use talk tracks for live calls.
Send follow-up emails.
Work on special projects, including periodic competitive calls, calls to unassigned schools, specialty schools and other telemarketing efforts.
Periodically research schools to help identify top prospects and maintain the database. Use templates to create and send flyers and update PowerPoint presentations.

Desired work experience in sales, marketing, promotions or telemarketing.
Proficiency in relevant computer applications including CRM.
Desired knowledge of customer service/sales principles and practices.

Familiar with office rules/office environment

description:
About the job

Digital Marketing Content Specialist - Remote | Full-Time

About The Company

We are a private equity firm that owns and operates two regional lawn and pest control companies — one in New Orleans, Louisiana, and one in Jacksonville, Florida. Both businesses are in active growth mode with a concentrated push into digital marketing to drive customer acquisition and brand visibility across their local markets.

About The Role

This role exists because leadership has a clear marketing vision and no bandwidth to execute it. The principals are running these businesses day-to-day and can set the strategy — they need someone who can take a brief, work independently, and deliver finished product without being managed through every step.

You won't be handed a detailed playbook for every task. You'll be handed a direction and expected to move. This is an execution role, and the right person will treat it like a craft.

This person will support digital marketing efforts across both portfolio companies.

Key Responsibilities

Ad Content Production


Build Facebook and Instagram ad variations based on strategy briefs from leadership — expect to produce 5-10 creative variations per campaign
Write ad copy across multiple angles (offer-driven, testimonial, awareness, seasonal) and test messaging approaches
Resize and adapt existing creative assets for different placements and formats (feed, story, reel, carousel)
Monitor ad performance at a surface level and flag low performers or creative fatigue to leadership
Stay current on Meta ad best practices — formats, creative trends, and what's working in local service marketing


Video Editing & Production Support


Edit raw video footage into social-ready clips for Facebook, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts
Add captions, transitions, music, and branded elements to raw footage
Maintain brand consistency across all video output — tone, fonts, color treatment
Turn around edited video within 24 hours of receiving source material in most cases
Repurpose long-form video into short clips and platform-specific cuts


Graphic Design & Creative Assets


Design digital and print-ready assets: flyers, door hangers, mailers, promotional graphics, and seasonal campaign materials
Create branded templates for recurring content types to improve production speed over time
Maintain a library of approved brand assets, fonts, colors, and logo files for both companies
Produce social graphics, cover images, and profile assets as needed


Content Creation & Copywriting


Draft social media captions, post copy, and short-form content for both company accounts
Assist with blog posts, email newsletters, or promotional write-ups on an as-needed basis
Adapt tone and messaging between the two portfolio brands as needed
Use AI tools to accelerate content drafts — then refine, edit, and elevate the output to publish-ready quality


Workflow, Communication & Execution


Manage multiple concurrent projects across two companies and communicate priorities clearly
Receive direction asynchronously and execute with minimal follow-up needed
Proactively flag blockers, capacity constraints, or timeline risks — before they become problems
Maintain an organized file structure and content calendar so nothing falls through the cracks
Coordinate with the external SEO firm on an as-needed basis (website and landing pages are handled separately)


Required Qualifications


2+ years of hands-on experience in digital marketing, content creation, or a closely related role
Demonstrated ability to produce Meta/Facebook ads — copy, creative, and format adaptation
Proficiency with AI content tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, or similar) as a production accelerator, not a replacement for judgment
Video editing competency in CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, Adobe Premiere, or equivalent
Graphic design skills sufficient for social and print assets (Canva, Adobe Express, Photoshop, or similar)
Strong written English — this person communicates directly with company principals and produces outward-facing content
Portfolio or work samples required — candidates without demonstrable creative output will not advance


Preferred Qualifications


Experience supporting multiple brands or clients simultaneously (agency background is a strong signal)
Familiarity with home services, trades, lawn care, pest control, or local service business marketing
Working knowledge of Meta Ads Manager — campaign structure, audience basics, creative specs
Experience managing or contributing to a content calendar across multiple accounts
Comfort working U.S. business hours or maintaining overlap with U.S. Eastern/Central time zones

description:
About the job

This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Lifecycle & Retention Strategist at E-commerce Growth Agency based in Mexico.

This role sits at the intersection of strategy, data, and customer experience, focused on helping high-growth subscription e-commerce brands significantly improve customer lifetime value and long-term retention. You will act as a key strategic partner to clients, shaping lifecycle marketing programs that directly impact revenue, churn reduction, and subscriber engagement. The environment is fast-paced and highly analytical, with strong emphasis on experimentation, performance measurement, and continuous optimization. You will work across multiple client accounts, collaborating with specialists in CRM execution, design, and copywriting to bring retention strategies to life. This is a client-facing role requiring both strategic thinking and hands-on ownership of lifecycle marketing performance. Your work will directly influence how leading CPG subscription brands scale sustainably.

Accountabilities


Develop and execute lifecycle and retention strategies to maximize LTV and reduce churn across subscription-based brands
Own client relationships as the main strategic point of contact for retention marketing initiatives
Build and optimize lifecycle journeys including email/SMS automations, segmentation, and retention flows in tools like Klaviyo
Conduct cohort and customer behavior analyses to identify trends and retention opportunities
Manage retention calendars and campaign planning across multiple client accounts
Analyze performance metrics and provide actionable insights to improve retention outcomes
Collaborate with CRM specialists, designers, and copywriters to execute high-impact campaigns
Lead retention projects end-to-end, ensuring timely delivery and strong performance results
Continuously monitor industry trends in subscription commerce and lifecycle marketing to inform strategy
Strengthen long-term client relationships and contribute to account growth and retention


Requirements

This role requires strong experience in lifecycle or retention marketing within e-commerce or subscription-based business models, combined with a deep understanding of customer data, CRM systems, and performance-driven marketing. The ideal candidate is both strategic and hands-on, with strong client management skills and the ability to turn data into actionable growth strategies.


4+ years of experience in retention marketing, lifecycle marketing, CRM, or similar roles
Strong expertise in Klaviyo (flows, automations, segmentation, reporting, and lifecycle strategy)
Proven ability to conduct cohort analysis and derive insights from customer behavior data

¡Esta oportunidad es para ti!!

Únete a nuestro equipo y juntos transformemos vidas.




¿Qué harás?

description:
About the job

Company Description Charly Agency is a digital agency specializing in high-quality design, technology, and marketing services that help businesses grow and succeed. Known for building high-converting, future-proof websites, apps, and brand assets, the agency’s portfolio includes notable projects such as the Livetrained Web App, Universal Peace Sanctuary NGO Website, and Aerial Canvas Corporate Website. Clients value Charly Agency’s responsiveness, dedication, and strong results across web design, app design, brand strategy, ecommerce optimization, development, SEO, and content writing. The agency serves consumer brands, B2B companies, and ecommerce businesses on platforms including Shopify, Webflow, WordPress, and custom cloud applications. With offices in San Francisco, CA, and Barcelona, Spain, Charly Agency operates globally, partnering with startups and enterprises to deliver impactful digital strategy and solutions.
Role Description The Senior Web Project Manager & Marketing Strategist is a full-time remote role responsible for leading complex web and digital marketing projects from discovery through launch and optimization. This role coordinates cross-functional teams including design, development, and content to ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and aligned with client goals. Day-to-day tasks include defining project requirements, creating timelines and budgets, managing resources, and maintaining clear communication with clients and internal stakeholders. The person in this role will also develop data-informed marketing strategies, oversee website performance and conversion optimization, and recommend improvements across UX, content, and technical implementation. They will regularly review analytics, prepare progress reports, and ensure consistent delivery of high-quality digital experiences that support client growth.
Qualifications
 
Strong Web Project Management and Project Management skills, including scoping, scheduling, budgeting, and risk management.
Excellent Communication skills for collaborating with clients, guiding internal teams, and presenting strategies and results.
Practical understanding of Web Design principles, UX best practices, and modern interface patterns.
Working knowledge of Web Development processes, CMS platforms (e.g., Shopify, Webflow, WordPress), and collaboration with engineering teams.
Proven experience managing multi-stakeholder digital projects within an agency or similar environment.

description:
About the job

Role: Senior CRM Configuration Lead (Veeva/Salesforce – Life Sciences)

Location: : Mexico (100% Remote role) 

Job Type: Contract




Job Description: 

Overview

The Senior Configuration Specialist is responsible for the design, configuration, and optimization of regulated life sciences platforms (e.g., Veeva CRM/Vault, Salesforce Health Cloud, Compliance Wire, Agile Loft). This role supports commercial, medical, and regulatory operations, ensuring systems are aligned with business processes and compliant with GxP and industry standards.




 Key Responsibilities

Lead system configuration and enhancements across platforms such as Veeva CRM/Vault, Salesforce, ComplianceWire, and AgileLoft
Translate business requirements into scalable configuration solutions supporting commercial, field medical, MLR review, QA, and patient services workflows
Configure objects, workflows, validation rules, security models, and integrations within regulated environments
Partner with business stakeholders (Commercial Ops, Medical Affairs, Marketing, QA, Regulatory) to drive process improvements and system optimization
Ensure compliance with GxP, 21 CFR Part 11, and data governance standards
Support release management, deployments, and environment coordination across dev/test/prod
Perform impact assessments and root cause analysis for production issues and system changes
Collaborate with data, integration, and analytics teams (Snowflake, Databricks, Power BI) for downstream reporting
Develop and maintain configuration documentation, SOPs, and validation deliverables (IQ/OQ support)
Mentor junior resources and contribute to best practices within managed services delivery models

 Required Qualifications

6+ years of experience in life sciences systems configuration or CRM/platform administration
Hands-on expertise with Salesforce and/or Veeva (CRM, Vault, PromoMats, MedComms)
Experience supporting regulated environments (GxP, validation, audit readiness)
Strong knowledge of configuration best practices (no/low-code) vs. customization
Experience with MLR processes and workflows, commercial operations, or patient services systems
Familiarity with integration patterns (APIs, middleware) and data flows
Proven ability to work in onshore/nearshore delivery models and client-facing environments

 Preferred Qualifications

Salesforce certifications (Admin, Advanced Admin, Platform App Builder) or Veeva certifications
Experience with Compliance Wire, Agile Loft, or similar QA/training platforms
Exposure to data platforms (Snowflake, Databricks) and reporting tools (Power BI, Tableau)
Knowledge of Agile/Scrum delivery models and DevOps tools
Prior experience in a consulting or managed services role

 Key Skills

Platform configuration & administration
Understanding of the different stakeholders in a life science organization, and the ability to communicate with each in context
Requirements translation & solution design
Regulatory compliance (GxP, 21 CFR Part 11)
Stakeholder engagement
Release & change management
Issue troubleshooting & root cause analysis

title: Senior Associate, Workforce Planning
skills: Build and maintain support capacity plan models at a monthly, weekly, and interval level for a large, 24/7/365 organization.
Forecast incoming contacts based on Delivery volume, Mx and Dx onboarding.
Analysis on historical data to provide insights that improve support operations.
Guide Short-Term staffing adjustments to address current staffing gaps.
Work with our operations team to track how our staffing is being implemented and optimized. Make proactive and corrected improvements.
Partner with Real Time Analysts for demand insight and outage reporting.
Build out and report on seasonality trends in a complex, growing integrity organization.
Produce, dig into and use data and insights to identify opportunities to improve speed, quality, effectiveness, and customer experience

Partner with teams within integrity, customer experience, and our product, engineering, and tools teams to improve processes and the resulting customer experience for consumers, merchants, and dashers, and helping DoorDash become a safe and trustworthy platform
Accomplish your recommendations from start to finish, from digging into Excel/SQL to creating a budget to implementing timelines, aligning partners, testing ideas, achieving and measuring results
Identify areas for improvement and/or innovation around efficiency and customer experience from deep dives and understanding customer's cases; drive new ideas to be built and tested
Analytical and data driven - you love getting into the weeds.
Enjoy attacking complex problems and building something that hasn't existed before.
Well-organized and attentive to detail; have outstanding written and verbal communications skills.
Impeccable follow-up and follow-through capabilities, you can execute and get the job done.
Comfortable in a fast-paced, constantly changing, team-oriented environment and able to manage multiple deadlines simultaneously.
Have an owner mentality; you're focused on quality, output driven, an extreme hustler, proactive, and always pushing yourself to do better.
You are eager to bring solutions to big challenges in creative new ways
You like to dig in. You don't hesitate to get in the weeds and operate at the lowest level of detail, but you're as comfortable thinking long-term and inspiring a team.
You're unafraid of the unknown. Rapid change and learning is exciting to you, and you excel in constant change.
You love data. You let data win arguments, and you're comfortable pulling data or modeling in Excel/Google Sheets.
You don't give up. If your plan doesn't work, you have 3 more options in your back pocket.
You have 4+ years of post-grad experience. You've succeeded in diverse cultures (whether in tech, operations, strategy, consulting, banking, or a related experience).
description:
About the job

About the Team

The GSIO Workforce Management Planning Team consists of our Senior Manager, 3 Workforce Managers, multiple Workforce Planners/Schedulers and RTAs. Enjoy a comfortable team-oriented environment where things are always happening at a rapid pace and you can prioritize and organize tasks simultaneously. Manage outcomes and be empowered to make the decisions to lead to those outcomes. Be focused on quality, output-motivated, an extreme achiever who is progressive, and always pushing yourself to be 1% better each day!

About the Role

As one of DoorDash's core operations teams, Support Ops is tasked with ensuring that when there are bumps in the last mile there's always someone there to help make things right. Our team designs, manages and operates DoorDash's massive and growing global network of support centers, with the ultimate goal of delivering a world-class customer experience every time.

As part of DoorDash's Support Operations Team, we're looking for an experienced Workforce Planner to help develop and scale our support lines of businesses in the Phoenix area. This role will be a key player in planning our monthly, daily, and hourly staffing levels and ensure we're providing our customers with best-in-class service with up to date hiring plans. This role will play a vital part in improving forecast accuracy, reporting, and planning around floor staff utilization and efficiency.

You're excited about this opportunity because you will…


Build and maintain support capacity plan models at a monthly, weekly, and interval level for a large, 24/7/365 organization.

Identify areas for improvement and/or innovation around efficiency and customer experience from deep dives and understanding customer's cases; drive new ideas to be built and tested


We're excited about you because…


Analytical and data driven - you love getting into the weeds.
Enjoy attacking complex problems and building something that hasn't existed before.
Well-organized and attentive to detail; have outstanding written and verbal communications skills.
Impeccable follow-up and follow-through capabilities, you can execute and get the job done.
Comfortable in a fast-paced, constantly changing, team-oriented environment and able to manage multiple deadlines simultaneously.
Have an owner mentality; you're focused on quality, output driven, an extreme hustler, proactive, and always pushing yourself to do better.
You are eager to bring solutions to big challenges in creative new ways
You like to dig in. You don't hesitate to get in the weeds and operate at the lowest level of detail, but you're as comfortable thinking long-term and inspiring a team.
You're unafraid of the unknown. Rapid change and learning is exciting to you, and you excel in constant change.
You love data. You let data win arguments, and you're comfortable pulling data or modeling in Excel/Google Sheets.
You don't give up. If your plan doesn't work, you have 3 more options in your back pocket.
You have 4+ years of post-grad experience. You've succeeded in diverse cultures (whether in tech, operations, strategy, consulting, banking, or a related experience).


About DoorDash

At DoorDash, our mission to empower local economies shapes how our team members move quickly, learn, and reiterate in order to make impactful decisions that display empathy for our range of users—from Dashers to merchant partners to consumers. We are a technology and logistics company that started by enabling door-to-door delivery, and we are looking for team members who can help us go from a company that is known as the place you order food to a company that people turn to for any and all goods.

DoorDash is growing rapidly and changing constantly, which gives our team members the opportunity to share their unique perspectives, solve new challenges, and own their careers. We're committed to supporting employees' happiness, healthiness, and overall well-being by providing comprehensive benefits and perks.

Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion

We're committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That's why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

If you need any accommodations, please inform your recruiting contact upon initial connection.

We use Covey as part of our hiring and/or promotional process for jobs in certain locations.

The Covey tool has been reviewed by an independent auditor. Results of the audit may be viewed here: https://getcovey.com/nyc-local-law-144

To request a reasonable accommodation under applicable law or alternate selection process, please inform your recruiting contact upon initial connection.

description:
About the job

Ecommerce & Marketing Manager




Reports to: VP of Sales & Marketing

Company: The Latest Scoop

Location: Hybrid / Remote




About the Role




The Latest Scoop is looking for a commercially driven, hands-on Ecommerce & Marketing Manager to lead growth across our online business and retail marketing initiatives.




This is a hybrid role with broad accountability. You will own ecommerce end-to-end, from strategy through execution, while also leading and deploying marketing strategy for the retail side of the business. You will work closely with the VP of Sales & Marketing, buying and planning, social media, email marketing, creative, and store teams to drive revenue, improve customer experience, and ensure strong alignment across channels.




This role is for someone who can think strategically, act decisively, and execute consistently. You need to be comfortable moving between big-picture planning and day-to-day execution. This is not a pure coordinator role, and it is not a role for someone who only wants to manage agencies from a distance.







What You’ll Own




Ecommerce




Own the ecommerce business, including strategy, execution, and performance
Manage the day-to-day online experience to ensure the site is customer-friendly, high-converting, and commercially effective
Optimize site merchandising, navigation, landing pages, product pages, and checkout flow
Partner with the buying and planning team to align inventory, launches, pricing, and promotional priorities
Identify opportunities to grow conversion, average order value, and online revenue




Digital Marketing




Lead digital marketing initiatives that support ecommerce growth, customer acquisition, and retention
Oversee paid media strategy and execution across channels such as Google, Meta, TikTok, and other relevant platforms
Work with creative and content partners to develop campaigns and assets that perform
Monitor campaign performance, optimize spend, and improve return on ad spend




Email & CRM




Partner with the email marketing team to drive campaign and lifecycle performance
Align email and CRM initiatives with product launches, promotions, and broader business objectives
Improve segmentation, personalization, automation, and testing to increase engagement and retention
Track and optimize key metrics including conversion, revenue contribution, and customer response




Retail Marketing




Lead and deploy the marketing strategy for the retail side of the business
Build initiatives that drive store traffic, customer engagement, and sell-through
Support key campaigns, store events, launches, and seasonal marketing moments
Ensure brand consistency across retail and digital touchpoints while adapting execution to the needs of stores




Cross-Functional Leadership




Act as the connector across ecommerce, retail, buying, planning, social, email, and creative
Ensure campaigns, messaging, product focus, and timing are aligned across channels
Collaborate with customer service and operations to identify friction points and improve the customer experience




Analytics & Performance




Define and track KPIs across ecommerce and marketing
Use tools such as Shopify, Google Analytics, Klaviyo, and ad platforms to assess performance and uncover opportunities
Deliver clear reporting, insights, and recommendations to leadership
Use data to make decisions, not just to describe what already happened




What We’re Looking For




4+ years of experience in ecommerce, digital marketing, or omnichannel marketing
Proven ability to drive revenue through both strategic thinking and hands-on execution
Experience with ecommerce platforms such as Shopify or similar
Strong understanding of paid digital marketing, email/CRM, and online merchandising
Experience working cross-functionally with merchandising, planning, creative, and retail teams
Strong analytical skills and comfort using performance data to drive action
Highly organized, commercially minded, and detail-oriented
Strong communication skills and ability to operate in a fast-moving environment




Preferred




Experience in fashion, apparel, lifestyle, beauty, or retail
Familiarity with SEO, A/B testing, customer segmentation, and marketing automation
Understanding of omnichannel retail and store traffic-driving initiatives
Basic HTML/CSS knowledge is a plus




Why This Role Matters




This role sits at the intersection of brand, commerce, and execution. You will play a central role in how we grow online revenue, support our stores, and create a more connected customer experience across every touchpoint.




If you are equally comfortable setting strategy, analyzing performance, and doing the work required to drive results, we want to hear from you.

description:
About the job

EL EQUIPO

El equipo de Desarrollo de Negocios es responsable de construir, mantener y hacer crecer relaciones estratégicas con nuestros socios comerciales, asegurando la correcta implementación de las soluciones de Ticketmaster y maximizando el desempeño de sus eventos en vivo. Trabajamos de forma colaborativa para impulsar el crecimiento sostenible del negocio.




DESCRIPCIÓN DEL CARGO

Como Ejecutiva(o) de Cuentas, serás una pieza clave en la gestión y desarrollo de una cartera estratégica de clientes dentro de Ticketmaster. Este rol es el principal punto de contacto entre todas las áreas de Ticketmaster y nuestros promotores y aliados comerciales.

Actualmente, la división de Desarrollo de Negocios se encuentra en una etapa de crecimiento y consolidación, con una agenda cada vez más dinámica de eventos en vivo, innovación tecnológica y nuevos modelos de negocio. Este es un momento emocionante para integrarte al equipo, ya que tendrás la oportunidad de influir directamente en los resultados comerciales, fortalecer relaciones de largo plazo y contribuir a experiencias memorables para millones de fans.




LO QUE HARÁS

Gestionar el correcto y total cumplimiento contractual, acuerdos comerciales y condiciones negociadas con los clientes de la cartera asignada, asegurando relaciones sólidas, de confianza y de largo plazo.
Gestionar con las demás áreas de Ticketmaster todas las acciones necesarias para que el total de la cartera asignada de clientes conozca la gama de servicios, herramientas y soluciones que ofrece Ticketmaster para maximizar ventas y eficiencia operativa.
En colaboración con el área de Business Intelligence, analizar el desempeño de ventas y proponer estrategias de optimización para alcanzar y superar objetivos comerciales.
Identificar oportunidades de crecimiento dentro de la cartera asignada y proponer nuevas soluciones o modelos de negocio.
Resolver incidencias de manera proactiva, asegurando una experiencia positiva para clientes y fans.
Preparar reportes, presentaciones y análisis para clientes y líderes internos.




LO QUE NECESITAS SABER (o HABILIDADES TÉCNICAS)

Lic. en áreas económico‑administrativas, comercio, mercadotecnia, comunicación o afín.
Experiencia comprobable de al menos 2 a 4 años en gestión de cuentas, relaciones comerciales y/o desarrollo de negocios.
Conocimiento en manejo de clientes B2B y negociación comercial.
Capacidad para analizar información de ventas y desempeño comercial.
Experiencia trabajando con múltiples proyectos de forma simultánea.
Manejo intermedio‑avanzado de Excel, Salesforce y herramientas de presentación.
Deseable experiencia en la industria del entretenimiento, eventos en vivo o servicios.
Inglés B2 conversacional.
Habilidad para trabajar con procesos, contratos y seguimiento administrativo.




TÚ (BEHAVIOURAL SKILLS)

Colaboras activamente con otros equipos, entendiendo que el éxito se construye en conjunto.
Generas confianza a través de un actuar consistente y responsable.
Tomas decisiones con ética, transparencia y enfoque en el largo plazo.
Te comunicas de manera clara, empática y profesional con distintos públicos.
Te adaptas con rapidez a entornos dinámicos y a cambios en las prioridades del negocio.
Actúas con sentido de pertenencia y fomentas un ambiente inclusivo y respetuoso.




OFRECEMOS

Contrato directo.
Prestaciones de ley, superiores y adhesión a diversos programas internos.
Estacionamiento gratuito
Zona de trabajo: Metro velódromo - Iztacalco
Jornada de trabajo: tiempo completo




VIDA EN TICKETMASTER

Nos enorgullece formar parte de Live Nation Entertainment, la empresa de entretenimiento en vivo más grande del mundo. Nuestra visión en Ticketmaster es conectar a las personas alrededor del mundo con los eventos en vivo que aman.

Como el mercado de boletos más grande del mundo y el proveedor global líder de herramientas y servicios para la industria del entretenimiento en vivo, estamos en una posición única para cumplir con esa visión.

Lo hacemos todo con una pasión intensa por el entretenimiento en vivo y una cultura inspiradora y diversa, impulsada por líderes accesibles, gerentes atentos y equipos entusiastas. Si te apasiona el entretenimiento en vivo como a nosotros, y deseas trabajar en una empresa dedicada a ayudar a millones de fanáticos a vivir esa experiencia, queremos saber de ti.

Nuestra labor se guía por nuestros valores:

Fiabilidad: Entendemos que los fanáticos y clientes dependen de nosotros para hacer posible sus experiencias en eventos en vivo, y nosotros dependemos los unos de los otros para lograrlo.
Trabajo en equipo: Creemos que el logro individual es insignificante en comparación con el éxito que se puede lograr en equipo.
Integridad: Estamos comprometidos con los más altos estándares morales y éticos en nombre de los innumerables socios y partes interesadas que representamos.
Sentido de pertenencia: Estamos comprometidos a construir una cultura en la que todas las personas puedan ser su yo auténtico, tengan voz igualitaria y oportunidades para prosperar.




OPORTUNIDADES IGUALES

Estamos apasionados y comprometidos con nuestra gente, y vamos más allá de la retórica sobre diversidad e inclusión. Trabajarás en un entorno inclusivo y se te alentará a ser tú mismo en el trabajo. Haremos todo lo posible para ayudarte a equilibrar exitosamente tu vida laboral y personal. Como negocio en crecimiento, fomentaremos que desarrolles tanto tus aspiraciones profesionales como personales, disfrutes de nuevas experiencias y aprendas de las personas talentosas con las que trabajarás. Nos importa el talento, y alentamos las postulaciones de personas sin importar su género, raza, orientación sexual, religión, edad, estado de discapacidad o responsabilidades familiares.

title: Marketing Specialist
skills: Digital Marketing Strategy: Develop and execute comprehensive marketing strategies aimed at first responder agencies and healthcare professionals.
Content Creation: Craft compelling content including blog posts, newsletters, and social media updates that resonate with our target audience.
SEO Management: Optimize website content for search engines to enhance visibility for relevant keywords related to mental health services for first responders.
Social Media Engagement: Manage social media platforms, creating engaging posts that drive awareness and interaction among followers.
Analytics and Reporting: Analyze marketing performance metrics to assess the effectiveness of campaigns and suggest improvements.
Audience Segmentation: Identify and segment target audiences to tailor messaging specifically for different groups, including agencies and individual first responders.
Networking and Outreach: Develop relationships with potential referral sources, including healthcare providers and first responder agencies, to expand our reach.
Collaboration: Work closely with our team to align marketing efforts with overall practice goals and client needs.
Experience: Minimum 2+ years of experience marketing for American-based companies (Healthcare or Service Industry preferred).
Technical Savvy: Current with modern marketing technologies and social media algorithms; ability to use AI tools to optimize workflow (but not rely on them for core creativity).

Mindset: A "shark" mentality—proactive, aggressive in pursuing visibility, and capable of working without constant micromanagement.
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field is highly preferred.
Monitoring Tools: Open to using monitoring tools like Hubstaff.

You will be responsible for translating the clinical expertise of the Client into a digital presence that attracts the "right fit" clients—specifically those seeking therapy and testing rather than medication management.

Audience Segmentation: Identify and segment target audiences to tailor messaging specifically for different groups, including agencies and individual first responders.
Networking and Outreach: Develop relationships with potential referral sources, including healthcare providers and first responder agencies, to expand our reach.
Collaboration: Work closely with our team to align marketing efforts with overall practice goals and client needs.




Qualifications & Skills

Experience: Minimum 2+ years of experience marketing for American-based companies (Healthcare or Service Industry preferred).
Technical Savvy: Current with modern marketing technologies and social media algorithms; ability to use AI tools to optimize workflow (but not rely on them for core creativity).
Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English skills. While primarily a creative role, you must be comfortable making occasional outbound "warm" contacts to build referral relationships.
Mindset: A "shark" mentality—proactive, aggressive in pursuing visibility, and capable of working without constant micromanagement.
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field is highly preferred.

title: Web Browsing Analyst (Remote)
skills: Role: Web Browsing Analyst (Remote)

Job Type: Contract

description:
About the job

Role: Web Browsing Analyst (Remote)
Location: Remote (Work from Anywhere)
Job Type: Contract
Payout: $30 - $45/hour




Role Overview:

We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Web Browsing Evaluator to work on a contract basis. The role involves assessing the quality, relevance, and accuracy of web search results and browsing experiences. Evaluators will follow detailed guidelines to provide feedback on search engine performance and user interface effectiveness.




Key Responsibilities:

• Assess the relevance and accuracy of web search results based on specific queries and user intent.

• Evaluate the quality of web pages, including content accuracy, usability, and adherence to search engine guidelines.

• Provide detailed feedback on the browsing experience, including page load times, navigation, and overall user satisfaction.

• Identify and report issues such as broken links, outdated content, or misleading information in search results.

• Follow structured evaluation guidelines to ensure consistency and reliability in assessments.




Required Skills & Qualifications:

• Demonstrated ability to follow detailed written instructions and provide constructive feedback.

• Familiarity with web browsing, search engines, and basic understanding of how search algorithms function.

• Strong attention to detail and ability to evaluate content for accuracy and relevance.

• Basic computer literacy and proficiency in using web browsers.

• Ability to work independently with minimal supervision in a remote setting.




More About the Opportunity:

This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the improvement of search engine accuracy and user experience. Evaluators play a critical role in refining how information is delivered to users worldwide.




Equal Opportunity Employer:

We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications.




Apply Now!

En Walmart de México y Centroamérica estamos comprometidos con una cultura de pertenencia, por lo que buscamos incorporar el mejor talento basándonos en competencias, habilidades y potencial; no discriminamos por ningún motivo, incluyendo género, edad, origen étnico, apariencia física, estado civil, condiciones de salud por VIH o cualquier enfermedad, situación socioeconómica, discapacidad, orientación sexual, identidad o expresión de género por ello durante el proceso de atracción y selección no solicitaremos información personal, fotografías o análisis clínicos de ningún tipo. description:
About the job

At Gigamon, we are on a mission to protect the hybrid networks and data of some of the largest and most complex organizations around the globe. We're proud to be recognized as a Great Place to Work! Our innovative deep observability pipeline provides essential network intelligence to tools in the cloud, security, and observability space. This enables our customers to remove security blind spots, optimize network traffic, and significantly reduce costs and complexity in their tools, helping them effectively secure and manage their hybrid cloud infrastructure. With over 4,000 customers worldwide, including more than 80% of Fortune 100 companies, nine of the top ten mobile network providers, and numerous governments and educational organizations, we are making an impact.




About the Role: Senior Salesforce (SFDC) Analyst




We are excited to invite a passionate and self-motivated Senior SFDC Analyst to our dynamic Biz Apps team! You’ll join a small yet highly effective team that aims to achieve excellence in maintaining our core business applications and processes to support our corporate objectives and drive operational efficiency.




In this role, you will tackle exciting operational challenges and assist our internal teams in working smarter and more effectively. Initially, you’ll focus on supporting our Sales, Marketing, and Demand Generation teams by driving improvements in systems and processes, mainly within SFDC and its integrated applications like Traction Complete Marketing Systems and other marketing tools. By collaborating closely with subject matter experts (SMEs), you’ll pinpoint areas that need enhancement and transform those insights into actionable business requirements, gaining buy-in from stakeholders and overseeing the implementation process through solution development.




What You'll Do

Collaborate with SMEs to gain a comprehensive understanding of current business processes.
Make data-driven decisions and propose systematic process improvements.
Become the go-to expert for Gigamon’s SFDC functionality, integrations, and limitations.
Provide daily support and ownership of SFDC for our Marketing, Sales, and Demand Gen team super users.
Lead the SFDC implementation board for Demand Gen Ops , acting as the primary point of contact between business needs and IT development.
Manage the requirements of the intake process from initial discussions to the delivery of solutions.
Gather and document system enhancement requests, working closely with our IT development team to design and validate solutions.
Gather and document system enhancement requests, and design, develop, and validate solutions.
Organize user acceptance testing and support change management efforts.
Take on additional responsibilities as needed.




What You Bring

5+ years of experience in or supporting Sales or Marketing Operations
3+ years of hands-on experience managing SFDC implementations.
Salesforce administration certification or equivalent experience is essential.
Familiarity with Traction Complete Marketing Systems is a plus.
A strong ability to identify and address root causes of issues, implementing forward-thinking solutions based on thorough analysis.
Proven experience collaborating with and influencing various stakeholders to make informed business decisions.




Who You Are

Communicative and articulated, with strong written and verbal skills both in English and Spanish.
Capable of identifying and translating business needs into effective, compelling solutions.
You think big picture while paying attention to the details in execution.
Excellent project management skills to keep everything on track.
You are results-driven and dedicated to achieving progress.
A self-motivator with a proactive work ethic who can multitask effectively.
You understand, design, and operate within interconnected systems, all while prioritizing end-user simplicity.




As an equal opportunity employer, all applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, national origin, age, sexual orientation, disability, veteran status, genetic information, or any other protected characteristic under applicable federal, state, and/or local law. For more information, please refer to  Know Your Rights: Workplace Discrimination is Illegal. 




We are committed to providing reasonable accommodation for all qualified individuals with disabilities. If you require a reasonable accommodation, please contact us at (669) 240-2248.

If your experience and skills closely match our job description but may not necessarily fulfill all requirements, please still apply. Gigamon is on a continued mission to grow and scale an innovative organization. We believe this is best achieved by hiring, celebrating, and respecting people with diverse backgrounds, skills, perspectives, and experiences.




The privacy rights of all individuals including job applicants and candidates are very important to us. Our Gigamon Applicant Privacy Policy, will inform you about how Gigamon Inc. and its direct and indirect subsidiaries collect, use, store, or otherwise process personal information about job applicants and candidates, including through your access and/or use of our careers website and third-party job websites (e.g. LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor, Naukri, etc.).




We may use automated tools, including AI-based systems, to help screen and evaluate application materials for this role. These tools are designed to assess job-related qualifications only and do not make final hiring decisions; human reviewers remain involved in the process. Further, Gigamon uses Jobvite, developed by Employ, to screen and evaluate all Gigamon applicant resumes. The system analyzes resumes for skills, experience, and qualifications and processes employment history, education, and skills. This AI-based system is used for all Gigamon positions. For questions, contact [email protected]. You have the right to request reasonable accommodation; to do so, please send a message to [email protected].

About DoorDash

At DoorDash, our mission to empower local economies shapes how our team members move quickly, learn, and reiterate in order to make impactful decisions that display empathy for our range of users—from Dashers to merchant partners to consumers. We are a technology and logistics company that started by enabling door-to-door delivery, and we are looking for team members who can help us go from a company that is known as the place you order food to a company that people turn to for any and all goods.

DoorDash is growing rapidly and changing constantly, which gives our team members the opportunity to share their unique perspectives, solve new challenges, and own their careers. We're committed to supporting employees' happiness, healthiness, and overall well-being by providing comprehensive benefits and perks.

Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion

We're committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That's why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

About the job

¿Por qué trabajar en Fresenius Kabi?




En Fresenius Kabi México, tenemos una misión clara: salvar, cuidar y mejorar la vida de las personas. Cada acción que realizamos tiene un impacto real en la salud y el bienestar de millones, y trabajamos con pasión porque sabemos que lo que hacemos importa. Ofrecemos más que un empleo: brindamos carreras con propósito. Impulsamos el desarrollo de nuestros colaboradores en un entorno seguro, inclusivo y desafiante, con oportunidades de aprendizaje, bienestar integral, liderazgo cercano y reconocimiento.




Creemos en el poder del cuidado, no solo hacia nuestros pacientes, sino también entre nosotros. Fomentamos relaciones basadas en el respeto, la colaboración y la confianza, promoviendo el equilibrio entre la vida laboral y personal. Aquí, cada colaborador es clave para cumplir nuestra misión. title: Talent Marketing Partner
description:
About the job

Work Mode: Remote

Location: Remote - Mexico

 Opportunity 

The Team

The Talent Marketing team at Kohler is where strategy, data, execution, and storytelling come together to attract, engage, and convert talent. We act as the marketing engine for Talent Acquisition—creating high-impact campaigns to create moments that matter across our career website, paid media channels, social media, and other key candidate touchpoints. From crafting compelling employer brand narratives and collateral to optimizing full-funnel recruitment marketing campaigns, we strive to connect the right talent with the right opportunities at Kohler.

The Role

The Talent Marketing Partner, reporting into the Talent Marketing team, plays a pivotal role in shaping Kohler’s ability to attract, engage, and convert top talent through strategic marketing initiatives across Mexico. This position serves as both a business partner and functional marketer, ensuring that talent marketing strategies align with business objectives while equipping the team with the tools, processes, and insights needed for success. The Talent Marketing Partner overseeing Mexico will join an exciting period of team expansion and can shape the regional Talent Marketing roadmap that will drive meaningful impacts.

Key Responsibilities

Business Partnership & Stakeholder Enablement

Act as a strategic advisor to recruiting teams and business stakeholders, consulting on talent marketing strategies that drive measurable outcomes for manufacturing and corporate roles.

In collaboration with an agency partner, you will develop, implement, and evaluate Talent Marketing strategies and tactics tailored to business needs and workforce priorities.

Enable stakeholders with branded content and attraction materials, ensuring alignment with Kohler’s global Employer Value Proposition (EVP) and Employer Brand (EB) standards.

Serve as a trusted consultant for talent marketing and brand best practices, tools, and emerging trends.

Functional Marketing Capability Enablement

Drive key initiatives across core talent marketing pillars, including:

Channel Marketing: Onboard, test, and optimize paid and organic channels for candidate engagement and conversion.

Employer Brand & Content Marketing: Activate Kohler’s global EVP by implementing branded content, attraction materials, and advocacy programs.

Digital Ecosystems: Enhance candidate experience across career sites, social platforms, channels, ATS platforms, and future marketing tools.

Data & Insights: Establish reporting frameworks and analytics to measure campaign effectiveness, return-on-investment and brand sentiment.

Equip and enable the Talent Marketing team with structures, tools, processes, and technology to execute strategies effectively in Mexico.

Lead continuous improvement efforts to standardize workflows, enhance scalability, and ensure operational excellence.

Collaborate cross-functionally with TA, HR, Communications, and Marketing to maintain brand consistency and governance.

Partner with agency partners and industry vendors to ensure timely delivery of Talent Marketing strategy execution.

Ability to collect, organize, and validate marketing performance data from multiple sources; synthesize insights into clear, actionable narratives; and present findings through compelling presentations that inform strategy and optimize campaign effectiveness.

Skills/Requirements

Minimum Qualifications

5+ years of experience in Talent Marketing, Employer Branding, Recruitment Marketing, or Channel and Brand Strategy; preferably at a marketing agency, global company, or a fast-growing organization.

Strong knowledge of digital and mass media marketing ecosystems, analytics, branding, and campaign optimization.

Experience with paid marketing channels (Meta/WhatsApp, LinkedIn, Google, Job Boards, OOH)

Experience with organic and owned marketing channels (career sites, email, SMS, social media pages, etc.).

Ability to write and verbally communicate in English and Spanish.

Proven ability to consult and influence stakeholders at all levels.

Exceptional project management, organizational skills, and attention to detail.

Critical thinking with the ability to turn data into compelling insights and campaign strategies.

Desired Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in marketing, advertising, communications, HR, or related field.

Experience with HR technology platforms (job sites, ATS, Workday, career sites, programmatic job media platforms).

Experience with marketing technology and automation tools (CRM, Spinklr, Adobe, Surveys).

Proficiency in GA4, Adobe Analytics, PowerBI, and Excel to effectively analyze marketing performance and generate actionable insights.

Ability to write and verbally communicate in Portuguese to support regional teams in Brazil.

Demonstrated fluency in artificial intelligence (AI) concepts, tools, and applications, including the ability to leverage AI-driven platforms to enhance productivity, decision‑making, and business outcomes.

Experience in content marketing, including the ability to develop, launch, and optimize multi-channel content strategies, with clear measurement of performance and ROI through analytics and reporting insights.

 Why Choose Kohler? 

We empower each associate to #BecomeMoreAtKohler with a competitive total rewards package to support your health and wellbeing, access to career growth and development opportunities, a diverse and inclusive workplace, and a strong culture of innovation. With more than 30,000 bold leaders across the globe, we’re driving meaningful change in our mission to help people live gracious, healthy, and sustainable lives.

About Us

It is Kohler’s policy to recruit, hire, and promote qualified applicants without regard to race, creed, religion, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital status, national origin, disability or status as a protected veteran. If, as an individual with a disability, you need reasonable accommodation during the recruitment process, please contact kohlerjobs@kohler.com . Kohler Co. is an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer.

description:
About the job

Join the pioneer tribe. AI-First since December 2023.




Position: Personal Assistant

Total Annual Package: Up to USD $78,000 + comprehensive benefits

Base: Up to $66,000/year
Performance bonus: up to 10% of base, paid monthly

Location: Remote (Global)




Role Overview

Puffy is a Top 5 U.S. mattress brand with over $1 Billion in sales. This role serves as the CEO's strategic lifestyle coordinator — the connection point between vision and reality across all personal operations.

You'll orchestrate flawless execution across experience curation, strategic sourcing, provider network development, and proactive personal operations, ensuring the CEO's personal affairs run on autopilot while building systems that ensure nothing falls through the cracks.




What Is In It For You:

This isn't just another assistant role. This is your chance to become a world-class executive operations professional.




1. Build Direct CEO Partnership at Scale

Step into one of the rarest career accelerants available: a direct, daily operating relationship with a Forbes Council Member CEO running a billion-dollar global brand. You won't be adjacent to high-level decisions — you'll be the execution layer that makes them happen. Every interaction sharpens your judgment, expands your network, and builds instincts that take others a decade to develop.




2. Partner with the 1%

🏆 Top 5 Mattress Brand in the USA with Over $1 Billion USD in Sales

🌍 Great Place to Work Certified

💡 Work with Forbes Council Member CEO

Gain firsthand exposure to strategic decisions and high-velocity execution that drives a global brand.




3. Embrace Radical Flexibility

Work from anywhere in the world. This is a fully remote role designed around outcomes, not hours — giving you the autonomy to deliver exceptional results on your own terms while coordinating across time zones.




4. Build an Elite Network That Compounds

You'll develop and own relationships with world-class service providers across luxury, wellness, automotive, hospitality, and lifestyle categories. This network becomes a career asset that appreciates over time — positioning you as the person who can make anything happen, anywhere.




What You'll Need:

2-3 years of experience in concierge services, lifestyle management, hospitality, or executive/personal assistant roles where you've demonstrated exceptional execution
Master researcher with an ability to quickly identify and vet high-quality providers, products, and solutions
Resourceful problem-solver who thrives on challenges and finds solutions where others see obstacles
Exceptional communication skills with the polish to represent a CEO in all interactions with premium service providers
Meticulous attention to detail with zero tolerance for errors or missed follow-ups

The Puffy DNA

We're restless, perpetually hungry, and fast-paced, driven by an unwavering belief that we can outperform any competitor — regardless of their size.

Be the Owner: We don't hire employees; we welcome owners. You're accountable for results, not activity.
Execute with Urgency: We thrive in high-stakes environments by making thoughtful decisions quickly and acting decisively.
Demand Excellence: We solve the hard problems that others can't, pushing the boundaries of our craft.
Be AI-First: Daily multi-turn AI conversations challenge your assumptions.
Go All-In: When the mission demands it, we rally as one team to cross the finish line.




✨ Your Total Compensation & Benefits




💰 Compensation:

Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision insurance




🌴 Time Off:

Generous Paid Time Off (PTO) + Public holidays

With over 26 years of global experience, we combine AI-powered technology, world-class content, and human interaction to help organizations communicate without barriers and compete internationally.

We’re looking for a results-driven Junior Account Manager focused on the Mexican market, with strong relationship management skills, a strategic mindset, and the ability to identify growth opportunities within existing accounts.

description:
About the job

Job Title: Content & Social Media Manager (Video-Focused)
Work Hours: Full-time (40 hours per week)
Schedule/Timezone: Flexible overlap with U.S. hours / EST
Location: 100% Remote (Latin America Only)




Overview




Are you a creative storyteller who knows how to turn raw video footage into scroll-stopping social media content? We are looking for a strategic, video-savvy marketer to elevate our online presence and connect deeply with an audience searching for real health solutions.




We are a rapidly growing virtual thyroid health practice dedicated to helping clients reclaim their health, energy, and overall well-being through specialized, holistic care. As an innovative player in the wellness and coaching industry, we bridge the gap between complex health concepts and accessible, engaging education.




In this role, you will work closely with leadership to transform raw ideas and expert video recordings into high-performing, professional digital assets that build trust, expand our organic reach, and empower individuals on their health journeys.




Key Responsibilities




Editing raw video footage into polished, professional short-form and long-form content optimized for digital marketing campaigns
Managing the complete video production workflow seamlessly, taking projects from initial concept through to final delivery
Creating and schedule engaging content across Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, TikTok, and other primary digital channels
Maintaining content calendars to ensure a consistent, reliable, and strategic publishing schedule
Ensuring all visual and written assets strictly align with brand standards, messaging, and our unique visual identity
Research industry trends, platform algorithm updates, and competitor activity within the wellness and health space to keep content fresh and relevant
Presenting creative ideas, innovative content concepts, and strategic recommendations directly to company leadership
Repurposing existing long-form content into multiple bite-sized formats to maximize reach and audience engagement
Monitoring social media performance analytics and suggest continuous improvements based on data and audience behavior
Collaborating closely with leadership to translate complex thyroid health topics into highly accessible, engaging, and empathetic messaging
Supporting overall brand awareness initiatives and drive organic growth across all active platforms




Must-Have Requirements




5+ years of proven experience in social media management, content marketing, or digital marketing
Advanced video editing experience utilizing professional, industry-standard editing software
Strong, up-to-date understanding of platform-specific content strategies for Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, and TikTok
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills
A highly creative mindset combined with strong visual storytelling abilities
Demonstrated experience building, organizing, and managing comprehensive content calendars
Ability to work independently, take complete ownership of projects, and execute from start to finish
Strong attention to detail and a steadfast commitment to producing high-quality, professional work
A reliable, high-speed internet connection and a quiet, professional remote work environment
Comfort receiving constructive feedback and collaboratively refining content to meet strategic business goals
Proficiency with Manychat for social media automation and engagement




Nice-to-Have Requirements




Bilingual proficiency in English and Spanish
Direct experience working with health, wellness, medical, or coaching brands
Proficiency with Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar professional editing platforms
Experience utilizing graphic design tools such as Canva or Adobe Creative Suite
A deep understanding of organic social media growth strategies and community building
Experience crafting educational, authority-building, or thought-leadership content
A background working directly with founders, coaches, or healthcare professionals in a fast-paced environment




Why Join Us




This is your opportunity to use your creative talents for a truly meaningful mission. Instead of promoting generic products, you will be amplifying life-changing health education that helps people regain their vitality, energy, and quality of life. You will work closely with passionate leadership in a supportive, collaborative environment where your ideas are valued and your creative ownership is encouraged. If you enjoy the freedom of a remote, flexible schedule and want to be part of a growing wellness movement where your day-to-day work makes a tangible, positive impact on others, we would love to welcome you to the team.
